name: @clearline/data-access-profile
description: Personal-profile data-access layer for clearline-web (EPIC-CW-022 / US-CW-034): React Query hooks over /api/profile for identity edits, avatar upload/remove, the verified email-change flow, and per-notification channel/frequency preferences. Profile and avatar mutations invalidate the session query so the sidebar identity footer stays a single avatar source of truth. No UI, no business rules.

metadata.scope: Data-access lib for EPIC-CW-022 (US-CW-034 Personal Profile & Notification Preferences).
